hooks.name: conventional commit guard
hooks.description: Before running a shell command, if it is a `git commit` with a message (-m/--message or a heredoc-style commit), check the message against the Conventional Commits format (type(scope)?: description). Non-conforming messages are blocked (exit 2) so the agent retries with a valid message. Commits without an inline message (e.g. opening $EDITOR) pass through, since the message can't be inspected yet. Fail-open.
